title: Hoe to Scythe
description: Since the hoe can destroy crops and wheat faster, why not just turn it into a scythe?
body:
Simply replaces the ol' minecraft hoes into a scythe.

I made this because I thought it wouldn't make sense for a hoe to quickly break any crops, leaves, grass, you name it. So I thought it would be a great idea to just turn them into the tool that does that job.

Here's a preview of the Iron scythe.
![iron scythe preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18391700cb297391f0b124465648fd445f4e4bd3.png)

I've configured the hoe to also have a stylish way of holding it, or unless if that is how it's supposed to be held
![stylish way of holding a scythe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a0ba1aa4eef9f7e66f329bde6a313431bff4d9b.png)

It can also fit in an RPG style if this is used as a weapon.
